segments.text: Hasten, O God, to save me; come quickly, Lord, to help me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May those who want to take my life be put to shame and confusion; may all who desire my ruin be turned back in disgrace.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May those who say to me, "Aha! Aha!" turn back because of their shame.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But may all who seek you rejoice and be glad in you; may those who long for your saving help always say, "The Lord is great!"
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But as for me, I am poor and needy; come quickly to me, O God. You are my help and my deliverer; Lord, do not delay.
segments.speaker: David
